_comment: Claude Code MCP Server Configuration Example
_wsl_note: For WSL: Use Linux paths, Docker Desktop integration works seamlessly

filesystem._note: Provides additional file operations beyond Claude Code's built-in tools

web-search._description: Web search capabilities for finding documentation and solutions
web-search._note: Requires API key - check MCP documentation for setup

github._description: GitHub API integration for repository operations
github._setup: 1. Get token from https://github.com/settings/tokens (classic token with repo scope)
github._setup2: 2. Replace YOUR_GITHUB_TOKEN_HERE with your actual token
github._setup3: 3. Requires Docker (Docker Desktop for WSL users)
github._wsl_note: Ensure Docker Desktop has WSL2 integration enabled in Settings > Resources > WSL Integration

context7._note: May require additional setup - see https://github.com/upstash/context7-mcp

browsertools._note: Compatibility with Claude Code not verified

magic-mcp._description: Magic MCP server for enhanced capabilities
magic-mcp._note: Compatibility with Claude Code not verified

_installation_instructions.windows: Not applicable - use WSL for Claude Code on Windows
_installation_instructions.note: Remove all _comment, _description, _category, _note, _setup*, _wsl_note, and _installation_instructions fields before using
_installation_instructions.minimal_config: For minimal setup, keep only sequential-thinking and filesystem servers

_security_warnings.api_keys: NEVER commit this file with real API keys to git
_security_warnings.tokens: Add this file to .gitignore if it contains secrets
_security_warnings.docker_env: Docker environment variables are visible to container - use secure token storage in production
_security_warnings.wsl_access: WSL can access Windows filesystem - be cautious with credential files
